current_sprint.sprint_name: Consumer QR Public App + i18n Polish
current_sprint.goal: Fix public QR verify page (URL, typed response, richer display) and remove hardcoded /fr/ locale from all 7 portal sidebar layouts
current_sprint.note: All 13 tasks completed. 12 files modified. Commit 239ef36 pushed to terroir-ma-web. Backend 391/391 unit tests passing.

apps.name: portal
apps.status: FE-S9 complete — 42 routes, all 7 role sidebar layouts use params.locale (no more hardcoded /fr/)

apps.name: public
apps.status: FE-S9 complete — typed fetch (api-public.ts), richer verify page, correct /api/v1/verify/:uuid?lang= path, status badge, validFrom/validUntil

frontend_context.api_server_helper: apps/portal/src/lib/api-server.ts — apiFetch<T>(path, init) with Bearer token from getAccessToken()
frontend_context.api_public_helper: apps/public/src/lib/api-public.ts — fetchVerification(uuid, lang) with QrVerificationData + VerifyCertification types (no auth)

auth_helpers.getAccessToken: apps/portal/src/lib/auth-utils.ts — returns Keycloak access token from session
auth_helpers.getCooperativeId: apps/portal/src/lib/auth-utils.ts — returns cooperative_id from Keycloak JWT claim

completed_portals.cooperative_admin: members, farms, products, batches — list + detail + create
completed_portals.inspector: dashboard, inspections (list + detail + report form), batches/[id], products/[id]
completed_portals.lab_technician: dashboard, queue (list + detail + result form + PDF upload), submit test
completed_portals.certification_body: dashboard (4 stat cards), certifications list (pending, paginated), certification detail (grant/deny/revoke forms)

known_issues: jose@6 CompressionStream/DecompressionStream Edge Runtime warnings on build — benign, known Next.js + jose@6 issue
cooperative_id in session requires Keycloak custom claim configured — works in prod, returns null in dev without Keycloak
windows_fixes: output: standalone conditioned on NEXT_OUTPUT env
shadcn v4 globals.css rewritten for Tailwind v3
button.tsx replaced with plain HTML button

ci_pipeline_status.backend: GREEN — 391 unit + 29 integration + 35 e2e tests all passing
ci_pipeline_status.frontend: GREEN — portal 42 routes + public 4 routes, typecheck lint build all green

backlog_status.note: FE-S1 through FE-S9 complete. One sprint left: FE-S10 (customs-agent portal + E2E tests + Docker prod build, 15 SP).

next_actions: Run /plan for FE-S10 (final sprint: customs-agent export-documents portal + full E2E test suite + Docker production build, 15 SP)
FE-S10 scope: (customs-agent)/customs-agent/export-documents list + detail + clearance action, E2E tests for key user flows, docker-compose prod + Dockerfile optimizations
decisions_made_this_session: FE-S7: Cert-body dashboard — pending count from GET /certifications/pending?limit=1 meta.total; granted/denied/revoked from summing GET /certifications/analytics byRegion array
FE-S7: deny-form.tsx and action-buttons.tsx created ahead of schedule during Batch 3 to unblock typecheck checkpoint
FE-S8: CreateBatchForm uses Set<string> selectedIds; selectedTotal computed by filter+reduce; controlled totalQuantityKg input auto-fills
FE-S8: getCooperativeId() null-checked in every RSC — graceful fallback message rather than crash in dev
FE-S9: api-public.ts placed in apps/public/src/lib/ instead of creating packages/api-client — simpler, sufficient for one consumer
FE-S9: Backend /api/v1/verify/:uuid?lang= handles server-side i18n of statusDisplay + message — frontend just renders them
FE-S9: All 7 role layouts accept params: { locale: string } and build NAV hrefs + redirects dynamically — RSC-compatible, no client hook needed

FE-S9.note: QR verify + i18n polish — 42 routes, 12 files
